title: Press Properties
description:
Press Properties

Press Properties

The following list is a summary of properties for the Press object.  The details for each property are explained in the Description field.

Property	Description

Name Property	This property can set a particular name that is assigned to objects.  When Press object is created, name is assigned automatically.  For the assigned name, number is added after Press such as Press01.

You can change the name and up to 32 characters can be specified.  English one byte characters and underscore [ _ ] are available.  Also, you cannot use number for initial character.

Description Property	This property can set explanations for objects.  The explanation can be freely written using up to 255 characters.

Enabled Property	This property can set whether to enable the object.  When specifying True, the program executes the object.  When specifying False, the program executes the next object without executing the object.  Use this property when you want to save the sequence temporary without executing it or try with different parameters by copying objects during sequence creation.

AutoStepID Property	This property can set an automatic assignment of StepID in object execution.  When specifying True, assign StepID automatically.  When specifying False, it will be the value specified by StepID Property.  When assigning automatically, (sequence number *100 + object number) is set. StepID is recorded to files that the force or the position during the sequence execution is recorded.  It is used to determine which interval corresponds to which object.

StepID Property	This property can set StepID during the object execution.  It is only used when AutoStepID is False.

AbortSeqOnFail Property	This property can set operations when the object fails.  When specifying True, the program ends the sequence and proceeds to the next SPEL statement if the object fails.  When specifying False, the program proceeds to the next force guide object without ending the sequence even if the object fails.  It is used when you want to continue the sequence (ex: the recovery processes are included in the sequence when the object fails.)

IOPreprocessEnabled Property	This property can set I/O operations when the object starts.  When specifying True, the program executes I/O operation.  When specifying False, the program does not execute I/O operation.  I/O operations are defined by IOPreprocOutputBit Property and IOPreprocOutputStatus Property.  It is used when you want to operate the hands or peripherals before the object execution.

IOPreprocessOutputBit Property	This property can set I/O operations (output bit) when the object starts.  It is only used when IOPreprocEnabled is True.

IOPreprocessOutputStatus Property	This property can set output status in I/O operations when the object starts.  When specifying On, set the specified output bit to On (set to 1).  When specifying Off, set the specified output bit to Off (set to 0).  It is only used when IOPreprocEnabled is True.

Fx_ControlMode Property	You can set the control mode of Fx direction in the coordinate system specified by ForceOrient of the sequence.  When specifying Disabled, the robot does not move to Fx direction since the force control functions to Fx direction are not executed.  When specifying Press, the force control functions to Fx direction is executed as the press mode.  In the press mode, press to be the force specified by Fx_PressForce.  When specifying Follow, the force control functions to Fx direction is executed as the follow mode.  In the follow mode, the robot moves so that the external force will be 0.  Therefore, when the external force is applied, the robot moves to follow it.

Fx_PressForce Property	This property can set the pressing force in Fx direction during the object execution.  It is used when Fx_ControlMode is Press.

Fx_Firmness Property	This property set a gain that shows firmness of force control functions to Fx direction during the operation of the object.  It is used when Fx_ControlMode is Press or Follow.  When Fx_Firmness increases, the force control function to Fx direction will be strong.  Response to changes of the force is slow, however, oscillation does not occur. When Fx_Firmness decreases, the force control function to Fx direction will be weak.  Response to changes of the force is fast, however, oscillation is easy to occur.

Fy_ControlMode Property	You can set the control mode of Fy direction in the coordinate system specified by ForceOrient of the sequence.  When specifying Disabled, the robot does not move to Fy direction since the force control functions to Fy direction are not executed.  When specifying Press, the force control functions to Fy direction is executed as the press mode.  Press to be the force specified by Fy_PressForce in the press mode.  When specifying Follow, the force control functions to Fy direction is executed as the follow mode.  In the follow mode, the robot moves so that the external force will be 0.  Therefore, when the external force is applied, the robot moves to follow it.

Fy_PressForce Property	This property can set the pressing force in Fy direction during the object execution.  It is used when Fy_ControlMode is Press.

Fy_Firmness Property	This property set a gain that shows firmness of force control functions to Fy direction during the operation of the object.  It is used when Fy_ControlMode is Press or Follow.  When Fy_Firmness increases, the force control function to Fy direction will be strong.  Response to changes of the force is slow, however, oscillation does not occur.  When Fy_Firmness decreases, the force control function to Fy direction will be weak.  Response to changes of the force is fast, however, oscillation is easy to occur.

Fz_ControlMode Property	You can set the control mode of Fz direction in the coordinate system specified by ForceOrient of the sequence.  When specifying Disabled, the robot does not move to Fz direction since the force control functions to Fz direction are not executed.  When specifying Press, the force control functions to Fz direction is executed as the press mode. Press to be the force specified by Fz_PressForce in the press mode.  When specifying Follow, the force control functions to Fz direction is executed as the follow mode.  In the follow mode, the robot moves so that the external force will be 0.  Therefore, when the external force is applied, the robot moves to follow it.

Fz_PressForce Property	This property can set the pressing force in Fz direction during the object execution.  It is used when Fz_ControlMode is Press.

Fz_Firmness Property	This property set a gain that shows firmness of force control functions to Fz direction during the operation of the object.  It is used when Fz_ControlMode is Press or Follow.  When Fz_Firmness increases, the force control function to Fz direction will be strong.  Response to changes of the force is slow, however, oscillation does not occur.  When Fz_Firmness decreases, the force control function to Fz direction will be weak.  Response to changes of the force is fast, however, oscillation is easy to occur.

Tx_ControlMode Property	You can set the control mode of Tx direction in the coordinate system specified by ForceOrient of the sequence.  When specifying Disabled, the robot does not move to Tx direction since the force control functions to Tx direction are not executed.  When specifying Press, the force control functions to Tx direction is executed as the press mode.  Press to be the force specified by Tx_PressForce in the press mode.  When specifying Follow, the force control functions to Tx direction is executed as the follow mode.  In the follow mode, the robot moves so that the external torque will be 0.  Therefore, when the external torque is applied, the robot moves to follow it.

Tx_PressForce Property	This property can set the pressing force in Tx direction during the object execution.  It is used when Tx_ControlMode is Press.

Tx_Firmness Property	This property set a gain that shows firmness of force control functions to Tx direction during the operation of the object.  It is used when Tx_ControlMode is Press or Follow. When Tx_Firmness increases, the force control function to Tx direction will be strong.  Response to changes in the torque is slow, however, oscillation does not occur.  When Tx_StiffnessGain decreases, the force control function to Tx direction will be weak.  Response to changes of the torque is fast, however, oscillation is easy to occur.

Ty_ControlMode Property	You can set the control mode of Ty direction in the coordinate system specified by ForceOrient of the sequence.  When specifying Disabled, the robot does not move to Ty direction since the force control functions to Ty direction are not executed.  When specifying Press, the force control functions to Ty direction is executed as the press mode.  Press to be the force specified by Ty_PressForce in the press mode. When specifying Follow, the force control functions to Ty direction is executed as the follow mode.  In the follow mode, the robot moves so that the external torque will be 0.  Therefore, when the external torque is applied, the robot moves to follow it.

Ty_PressForce Property	This property can set the pressing force in Ty direction during the object execution.  It is used when Ty_ControlMode is Press.

Ty_Firmness Property	This property set a gain that shows firmness of force control functions to Ty direction during the operation of the object.  It is used when Ty_ControlMode is Press or Follow.  When Ty_Firmness increases, the force control function to Ty direction will be strong.  Response to changes in the torque is slow, however, oscillation does not occur. When Ty_Firmness decreases, the force control function to Ty direction will be weak.  Response to changes of the torque is fast, however, oscillation is easy to occur.

Tz_ControlMode Property	You can set the control mode of Tz direction in the coordinate system specified by ForceOrient of the sequence.  When specifying Disabled, the robot does not move to Tz direction since the force control functions to Tz direction are not executed.  When specifying Press, the force control functions to Tz direction is executed as the press mode.  Press to be the force specified by Tz_PressForce in the press mode.  When specifying Follow, the force control functions to Tz direction is executed as the follow mode.  In the follow mode, the robot moves so that the external torque will be 0.  Therefore, when the external torque is applied, the robot moves to follow it.

Tz_PressForce Property	This property can set the pressing force in Tz direction during the object execution.  It is used when Tz_ControlMode is Press.

Tz_Firmness Property	This property set a gain that shows firmness of force control functions to Tz direction during the operation of the object.  It is used when Tz_ControlMode is Press or Follow.  When Tz_Firmness increases, the force control function to Tz direction will be strong.  Response to changes in the torque is slow, however, oscillation does not occur.  When Tz_Firmness decreases, the force control function to Tz direction will be weak.  Response to changes of the torque is fast, however, oscillation is easy to occur.
